scripts.format: for p in server client website; do cd $p; npm run format; cd ..; done
scripts.lint: for p in server client website; do cd $p; npm run lint; cd ..; done
scripts.test: for p in server; do cd $p; npm run test; cd ..; done
scripts.check: npm run format && npm run lint && npm run test
scripts.version: read -p "Version number (x.x.x)?: " V; read -p "Version name?: " N; misc/version.sh $V $N
